purpose: Bind profitability and listing assets to one product, marketplace, governed task, and evidence lineage.

rules: Unknown values remain unknown and are not silently set to zero.
Price or cost changes create a new calculation revision.
A pricing action is separate Enterprise L4 work.
Keywords do not override readability or compliance.
The actual product must be inspectable.
Generated or edited assets must retain source lineage.
Image approval does not authorize external upload.
Exactly five customer-facing points are required.
Each material claim must have evidence.
Content must match the approved product and listing claims.
Unsupported guarantees and competitor claims are prohibited.
A+ or module-specific assets remain separate referenced artifacts.

completion.completed: All five deliverables pass independent verification.
completion.partial: At least one deliverable is missing, pending, disputed, or failed.
completion.rejected: Profitability or compliance fails the approved business threshold.

authority_boundary.external_upload_requires: Enterprise L4 connection action and responsible approval route
